'''Tymps''' were omnivores native to [[Serat]]. Originating in the world's forests, they were opportunistic, and adapted to life in [[Seratian]] cities, raiding storehouses for [[Roti (food)|roti]] [[Grain/Legends|grain]]. Seratians' hunting of [[symer]]s—the only natural predator of tymps—resulted in a tymp population explosion that jeopardized local agriculture.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
